description: The first maintained CLI for GL.iNet travel routers — named config profiles, travel macros, and version-aware diagnostics no other GL.iNet tool ships.

tools.name: clients_list
tools.description: List connected clients (ip, mac, name, tx/rx, online).

tools.name: system_info
tools.description: Model, firmware, OpenWrt version, hardware/software capability maps.

tools.name: system_status
tools.description: Live CPU, memory, clients, services, WAN/internet state.

tools.name: vpn_list
tools.description: Configured VPN client tunnels and their status.
